title: Immigration Service May Significantly Restrict Green Cards In The U.S. - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Immigration Service May Significantly Restrict Green Cards In The U.S.
Jonathan Grode was featured in a Forbes article examining a new USCIS memo that could significantly restrict adjustment of status applications for green cards within the United States. In the piece, Grode raised concerns about the memo’s legality, the potential strain on U.S. consulates abroad, and the broader impact on employment-based immigrants, families, and employers navigating the immigration system.
